summary: Crisp audience tape captures an explosive second set – Miracle, Shakedown Street, Terrapin > Playing in the Band and a stellar Playin' sandwich – despite a uneven first half.
review: The recording is an exceptionally clear audience capture with strong bass and crystal‑clear mix that lets every instrument shine. The show shines brightest after intermission, delivering a monster Miracle/Shakedown pair, a 34‑minute Terrapin > PITB marathon and one of the most memorable Playin' sandwiches of the era, while the first set is viewed as uneven with a few vocal slips. Overall fans praise the second‑set fireworks even though some note hiccups early on.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show and tape highly, highlighting superb second‑set jams and excellent sound quality; a few criticisms of the first set keep the overall rating just above four.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crisp, amazing, with better bass than many soundboard tapes from ’79; no notable drop‑outs or muddiness reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set feels uneven with occasional vocal slips, but the second set erupts into a seamless flow of high‑energy jams and tight transitions, making it one of the era’s must‑listen performances.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Hot throughout; brilliant Terrapin solo, precise runs on Playin', dominant during Miracle/Shakedown; occasional disjointedness early in first set.
band_member_comments.Phil: Lights the fuse on Miracle, dominates mix on Shakedown, soars through the second‑set jams and adds strong bass/funk foundation.
band_member_comments.Bob: Misses final verse of Jack Straw, but later provides dreamy harmonies on Playin' and delivers a high‑pitched thank you at the end of Casey Jones.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith Godchaux praised for one of his better performances; keyboards drive the Miracle/Shakedown groove and support the expansive jams.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drum sandwich highlighted as a standout moment; drummers (Bill/Mickey) energize the set, especially during Miracle and the Playin' sequence.
